title: chrysocoma ferruginea
intro: Chrysocoma ferruginea, also known as Golden Chamomile, is a perennial plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. The medicinal properties of Chrysocoma ferruginea include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive problems, relieving menstrual cramps, and reducing anxiety and insomnia. Chrysocoma ferruginea is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
